item.title: Cash vs. Financing at the Dealership
item.description: Here’s what changes when you show up with cash instead of a payment plan. A practical look at car buying, dealer pricing, and hidden fees. What should buyers know before choosing cash or financing?

media:content.media:title: Cash vs. Financing at the Dealership
media:content.media:description: Here’s what changes when you show up with cash instead of a payment plan. A practical look at car buying, dealer pricing, and hidden fees. What should buyers know before choosing cash or financing?

item.title: Dealer Trick That Pads Their Profit
item.description: A discussion of a dealership sales practice that can increase the final price of a vehicle purchase. The video explains how buyers can identify additional charges and better understand the buying process. What car-buying tip has helped you the most?

media:content.media:title: Dealer Trick That Pads Their Profit
media:content.media:description: A discussion of a dealership sales practice that can increase the final price of a vehicle purchase. The video explains how buyers can identify additional charges and better understand the buying process. What car-buying tip has helped you the most?

item.title: Why GM Disabled This Chevy Feature
item.description: A look at why a feature on certain Chevrolet vehicles was disabled and what it means for owners. The video explores the reported reasons behind the change and its potential impact on everyday use. Do you think manufacturers should make changes like this?

media:content.media:title: Why GM Disabled This Chevy Feature
media:content.media:description: A look at why a feature on certain Chevrolet vehicles was disabled and what it means for owners. The video explores the reported reasons behind the change and its potential impact on everyday use. Do you think manufacturers should make changes like this?

item.title: The Best Tahoe Price? Watch This First
item.description: A guide to shopping for a Chevrolet Tahoe, covering pricing, negotiation strategies, and factors that can affect the final purchase cost. The video offers practical tips to help buyers make informed decisions. What do you look for when comparing vehicle prices?

media:content.media:title: The Best Tahoe Price? Watch This First
media:content.media:description: A guide to shopping for a Chevrolet Tahoe, covering pricing, negotiation strategies, and factors that can affect the final purchase cost. The video offers practical tips to help buyers make informed decisions. What do you look for when comparing vehicle prices?

item.title: Leasing vs. Buying: What’s Right for You?
item.description: A practical look at leasing versus buying, with a focus on what each option means for pricing, ownership, and long-term value. Which approach fits your driving needs and budget best?

media:content.media:title: Leasing vs. Buying: What’s Right for You?
media:content.media:description: A practical look at leasing versus buying, with a focus on what each option means for pricing, ownership, and long-term value. Which approach fits your driving needs and budget best?

item.title: Chrome Wheels and Resale Value
item.description: A look at how chrome wheels can affect a vehicle’s resale appeal and what buyers should consider before purchase. What features help or hurt long-term value?

media:content.media:title: Chrome Wheels and Resale Value
media:content.media:description: A look at how chrome wheels can affect a vehicle’s resale appeal and what buyers should consider before purchase. What features help or hurt long-term value?

item.title: A Local Chevy Dealer Tried This
item.description: A look at a car buying situation involving a local Chevy dealer and hidden fees. What should buyers watch for when pricing and paperwork don’t match expectations?

media:content.media:title: A Local Chevy Dealer Tried This
media:content.media:description: A look at a car buying situation involving a local Chevy dealer and hidden fees. What should buyers watch for when pricing and paperwork don’t match expectations?

item.title: A Look at a Car Dealer Scam
item.description: A closer look at a car dealer scam and what it means for buyers. This video focuses on dealership practices and real-world car ownership advice. What should shoppers watch for when buying a vehicle?

media:content.media:title: A Look at a Car Dealer Scam
media:content.media:description: A closer look at a car dealer scam and what it means for buyers. This video focuses on dealership practices and real-world car ownership advice. What should shoppers watch for when buying a vehicle?

item.title: How Dealers Can Add Hidden Fees
item.description: Watch how the numbers can be changed before you see the final deal. A closer look at dealer pricing, hidden fees, and what car buyers should watch for. What should you check before signing?

media:content.media:title: How Dealers Can Add Hidden Fees
media:content.media:description: Watch how the numbers can be changed before you see the final deal. A closer look at dealer pricing, hidden fees, and what car buyers should watch for. What should you check before signing?

item.title: A Hidden Detail in This Used Vehicle
item.description: A closer look at a used vehicle and the surprising detail it was hiding. What would you check first when buying a car?

media:content.media:title: A Hidden Detail in This Used Vehicle
media:content.media:description: A closer look at a used vehicle and the surprising detail it was hiding. What would you check first when buying a car?

item.title: The Question Dealers Hope You Ask
item.description: One wrong question can give dealers the leverage in a car deal. Learn how to avoid hidden fees and keep control of pricing and financing. What should buyers ask first?

media:content.media:title: The Question Dealers Hope You Ask
media:content.media:description: One wrong question can give dealers the leverage in a car deal. Learn how to avoid hidden fees and keep control of pricing and financing. What should buyers ask first?

item.title: How Hidden Fees Sneak In Before Closing
item.description: See how a fee can be added before the paperwork closes, and why car buyers should review every line item carefully. What should shoppers watch for before signing?

media:content.media:title: How Hidden Fees Sneak In Before Closing
media:content.media:description: See how a fee can be added before the paperwork closes, and why car buyers should review every line item carefully. What should shoppers watch for before signing?

item.title: A Look at a Ridiculous Car Dealer Scam
item.description: This video examines a questionable dealership sales practice and highlights warning signs that car buyers should recognize. It explains how reviewing pricing, financing, and contract details can help avoid costly mistakes. What steps can help you spot potential issues before buying a car?

media:content.media:title: A Look at a Ridiculous Car Dealer Scam
media:content.media:description: This video examines a questionable dealership sales practice and highlights warning signs that car buyers should recognize. It explains how reviewing pricing, financing, and contract details can help avoid costly mistakes. What steps can help you spot potential issues before buying a car?
